General.Name: Titan America SA
General.Description: Titan America SA, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies heavy building materials and services in the United States. The company offers cement and cementitious materials, ready-mix concrete, aggregates, concrete blocks, fly ash, and other ancillary products. It also engages in trading, real estate holdings, insurance brokerage, and transportation brokerage activities. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Brussels, Belgium. Titan America SA operates as a subsidiary of Titan Cement International S.A.
